name: NodeGet Liquid Glass Theme
description: NodeGet Liquid Glass - a theme created from vibe coding
author: NodeSeekDev, telly3e

items.name: Site name
items.help: Enter the site name shown in the navigation bar.

items.name: Browser title
items.help: Enter the browser tab title. Leave empty to use NodeGet - StatusShow.

items.name: Site logo
items.help: Enter a site logo URL. Leave empty to use the default logo.

items.name: Dashboard URL
items.help: Node management dashboard URL. Leave empty to hide the settings button.

items.name: Default color mode
items.help: Choose the default color mode. Auto follows the browser preference.

items.name: Show sponsored footer
items.help: Show the sponsored footer. Turn off to use the standard footer text.

items.name: Card latency monitor
items.help: Cron monitor name used for the card latency preview. Leave empty to hide the preview.

items.name: Show value statistics card
items.help: Show the value statistics card in the left sidebar of the card view.

items.name: Show online / total nodes card
items.help: Show the online / total nodes card in the left sidebar of the card view.

items.name: Show expiring within 7 days card
items.help: Show the nodes expiring within 7 days card in the left sidebar of the card view.

items.name: Show expiring soon card
items.help: Show the expiring soon list card in the left sidebar of the card view.

version: will be auto filled using version in package.json
